sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content:
Truffle Oil A gourmet cooking ingredient. Information Source Artisan Goods • Desert Festival • Truffle Crabs • Traveling Cart Energy / Health 38 17 Sell Prices Base Artisan (+40%) 1,065g 1,491g Artisan Goods Equipment Oil Maker Processing Time 360m (6h) Ingredients Truffle (1)
Truffle Oil is an Artisan Good made in the Oil Maker from a Truffle , taking 6 hours to produce. It can also be dropped from Truffle Crabs . One may be purchased from Marnie 's shop at the Desert Festival for data-sort-value="50"> 50 Calico Eggs . Occasionally the Traveling Cart will offer it in her rotating stock.
Despite being listed as "A gourmet cooking ingredient" there are no cooking recipes that use it, but it is used to make the Rain Totem .

sections.heading: Bundles
sections.content: Truffle Oil is an option for the Artisan Bundle in the Pantry .

sections.heading: Crafting
sections.content: Truffle Oil is used to make the following items:

sections.heading: Notes
sections.content: Without the Artisan Profession , iridium quality truffles are worth more to sell outright rather than turn into oil.

sections.heading: Tailoring
sections.content: Truffle Oil can be used in the spool of the Sewing Machine to create the dyeable Dark Bandana Shirt . It can be used in dyeing , serving as a yellow dye at the dye pots, located in Emily 's and Haley 's house, 2 Willow Lane .

sections.heading: Quests
sections.content: - Mayor Lewis requests Truffle Oil by mail on the 21st of Summer (year 2) in the "Mayor's Need" Quest . The reward is data-sort-value="750"> 750g and 1 Friendship heart. Note that Lewis will send the letter triggering the quest regardless of whether or not the player owns a pig .

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.0 : Introduced.
- 1.4 : Can now be used in Tailoring .
- 1.6 : Now dropped by Truffle Crabs . Now purchasable through Desert Festival .
